title: Houses for Rent in Cudell, Cleveland
metaTitle: Houses for Rent in Cudell, Cleveland OH
metaDescription: Houses for rent in Cudell, Cleveland (ZIP 44102) near the Lake Erie shoreline — rent ranges, RTA access, and Section 8-friendly homes. Book a free showing.
answerBox: Cudell is a near-west-side Cleveland neighborhood in ZIP code 44102, along the Lake Erie shoreline next to Detroit-Shoreway. Citywide 2-bedroom rents run around $1,100/month per Zumper's July 2026 report, and Rent Finder Cleveland works with voucher-friendly rental homes in and around the area.

sections.h2: Renting a house in Cudell, Cleveland
body: Cudell is a near-west-side Cleveland neighborhood that runs along the Lake Erie shoreline, bordered by the Detroit-Shoreway district (home to the Gordon Square Arts District) to the east and Edgewater to the west. The neighborhood sits within **ZIP code 44102** and developed largely in the early 1900s, so the housing stock is a mix of frame single-family homes and two-family duplexes on compact city lots.

**We work with voucher-friendly rental homes in and around Cudell as part of our broader Cleveland selection.** Because availability changes regularly, the most reliable way to see current options is to [book a free showing](/p/book-showing) or tell our leasing team what you're looking for.

sections.h2: How much does it cost to rent a house in Cudell?
body: Cudell doesn't have its own published rent index, so the closest grounded benchmark is citywide Cleveland data. Per Zumper's July 4, 2026 report, Cleveland's overall median asking rent is $1,250/month, with 2-bedroom units averaging around $1,100 and 3-bedroom units around $1,350. RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report on professionally-managed apartments citywide shows a higher average of $1,564/month for 787 square feet, which reflects a different mix of newer buildings rather than Cudell's older housing stock specifically.

Rent Finder Cleveland's own selection across the city runs from about $700 to $1,800 a month, typically around $1,000, and includes single-family houses alongside duplexes, triplexes, and fourplexes — 44102 (Cudell and Detroit-Shoreway) is one of the ZIP codes where we currently work with homes.

Cudell is served by the GCRTA Red Line's West Boulevard-Cudell rapid station along Madison Avenue, giving direct rail access to downtown Cleveland (Tower City) in one direction and Cleveland Hopkins International Airport in the other, per GCRTA's published rail network. Several bus routes also run along Detroit Avenue and Madison Avenue connecting to downtown and neighboring west-side suburbs, and the Shoreway (I-90) provides quick highway access along the lakefront.

items: **ZIP code:** 44102, shared with the neighboring Detroit-Shoreway district
**Transit:** GCRTA Red Line (West Boulevard-Cudell station) plus Detroit Ave and Madison Ave bus routes
**Highways:** Quick access to I-90 (Shoreway) along the lakefront
**Nearby:** Cudell Commons Park on Lake Erie; Gordon Square Arts District just to the east

sections.h2: What kind of housing is available in Cudell?
body: Housing in Cudell is a mix of early-1900s single-family frame homes and two-family duplexes, typical of Cleveland's near-west-side lakefront neighborhoods. Lot sizes are modest, and many homes have small front porches and basements. Across our own Cleveland selection, roughly half of the units are duplexes rather than standalone houses, so renters searching Cudell listings should expect both formats. If you want to compare Cudell against other west-side options, [our citywide houses-for-rent guide](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) breaks down inventory by bedroom count and price.

sections.h2: Section 8 and voucher-friendly rentals in Cudell
body: Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with — including homes in the 44102 area — accepts Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8) and is HUD-inspection-ready, so voucher holders can tour and apply with confidence. Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority (CMHA) administers the local voucher program and accepts preliminary applications year-round through its [online applicant portal](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php); selection then runs through periodic lotteries rather than strict first-come-first-served order.

One important honest note: Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers, and the City of Cleveland does not currently have a source-of-income protection ordinance, so acceptance still depends on the individual landlord. For the full picture on how vouchers work locally, see our [Cleveland Section 8 housing guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/), or [connect with our team](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-west-boulevard-cleveland/) about voucher-friendly options in nearby West Boulevard as well.

faq.q: Are there Section 8 houses for rent in Cudell?
faq.a: Yes. Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with, including homes in the 44102 area that covers Cudell, accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. Acceptance by other individual landlords in the neighborhood varies, since Ohio has no statewide law requiring it. Book a showing to see what's currently available.

faq.q: What ZIP code is Cudell in?
faq.a: Cudell is in ZIP code 44102 on Cleveland's near-west side, along the Lake Erie shoreline next to the Detroit-Shoreway neighborhood and its Gordon Square Arts District.

faq.q: How much does it cost to rent a house in Cudell?
faq.a: There's no Cudell-specific rent index, but citywide Cleveland data from Zumper (July 2026) shows 2-bedroom homes averaging around $1,100/month and 3-bedrooms around $1,350/month. Our own Cleveland selection, which includes homes in the 44102 area, generally runs from about $700 to $1,800 a month.

faq.q: How do I get to downtown Cleveland from Cudell?
faq.a: Cudell is served by the GCRTA Red Line's West Boulevard-Cudell rapid station on Madison Avenue, offering direct rail service to downtown Cleveland's Tower City hub, plus bus routes along Detroit and Madison Avenues. I-90 (the Shoreway) is also nearby for drivers.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland works with homes in Cudell?
faq.a: Yes — 44102, which covers Cudell and neighboring Detroit-Shoreway, is one of the ZIP codes in our current Cleveland selection. Availability changes regularly, so tell our leasing team what you need or book a showing to see current options.
